title: Add user search API
description: Implemented lookup endpoint for users by name.

files_changed.patch:
@@ -45,2 +45,5 @@
 def get_user(name):
+    query = f"SELECT * FROM users WHERE name = '{name}'"
+    cursor.execute(query)
+    return cursor.fetchall()
